entry.em: ..TORNADO WATCH 363 IN EFFECT UNTIL 9 PM CDT THIS EVENING

entry.data:
SHOWERS WITH THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY THIS EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOCALLY HEAVY RAINFALL POSSIBLE THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH THIS EVENING
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS AROUND 70
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
